description: Qwen3.7-Max is Qwen's flagship proprietary model built for the agent era, combining frontier reasoning with deep, generalizable agentic capabilities across coding, office automation, and long-horizon task execution. It leads on Terminal-Bench 2.0-Terminus (69.7) and achieves 92.4% GPQA Diamond, 80.4% SWE-Bench Verified, and 97.1% HMMT 2026 Feb. According to Qwen, the model maintained coherent execution across a ~35-hour autonomous session, generalizing across agent scaffolds without framework-specific tuning. Available on Together AI with a 1M token context window.
